trigger_keywords: error message for sql database missing
what error when no sql database
error when type not in registry

context_pointers.vague_reference: See standard sorting rules for multi-flag entities
context_pointers.actual_meaning: Apply the alphabetical sort order defined in C026 (CLI argument sorting) to the provided flags array, ensuring all keys are lower-case except '--angular-suffix' which is appended at the end.

context_pointers.vague_reference: Refer to 'diagram' module for association comment handling
context_pointers.actual_meaning: Ensure the output JSON includes the exact field paths 'commentInFrom' and 'commentInTo' by preserving the property names from the input association objects for related entities.

oracle_data.fallback_response: I don't have more detail on that — check the codebase or the existing test cases for the exact behavior.

feature1_data_records.json.description: Construct model data records from supplied values or defaults and surface reserved-name failures as normalized errors.

feature2_type_registries.json.description: Query supported field types and validation rules for each storage profile, including invalid type handling.

feature3_diagram_parsing.json.description: Parse XMI/UML diagrams into normalized classes, fields, associations, comments, required flags, and type names.

feature4_entity_json_generation.json.description: Convert parsed diagrams into entity configuration JSON with fields, relationships, generation options, and modeling errors.

feature5_jdl_export.json.description: Export parsed diagrams as textual entity and relationship definitions, optionally appending generation directives.

feature6_diagram_metadata_helpers.json.description: Recognize editor metadata and normalize diagram names or identifiers used while interpreting model elements.

feature7_association_validation.json.description: Validate relationship cardinality endpoint rules and report malformed or unsupported associations.

feature8_generator_command_assembly.json.description: Build an external entity-generator command from an entity name and selected flags.

feature9_cli_options.json.description: Parse command-line flags and optional local configuration, with command-line values taking precedence.

cases.expected_output:
{
  "db": "sql",
  "fluent-methods": true,
  "fluentMethods": true,
  "h": false,
  "help": false,
  "v": false,
  "version": false
}

{
  "dto": "mapstruct",
  "fluent-methods": true,
  "fluentMethods": true,
  "h": false,
  "help": false,
  "v": false,
  "version": false
}

_constraints.output_rule: All outputs must start with the literal text 'Parser detected: MODELIO.\n\n' followed by the JSON payload
Returns JSON object with empty values, defaulting fields to 'no' or []

_constraints.input_condition: action is 'data-object' AND kind is 'entity' AND values object is provided
_constraints.output_rule: Returns JSON object with exact values from input object

_constraints.input_condition: action is 'data-object' AND kind is 'entity' AND name contains reserved word
_constraints.output_rule: Returns normalized error object instead of runtime exception

_constraints.input_condition: action is 'type-registry' AND database includes 'sql' AND query is 'types'
_constraints.output_rule: Returns JSON array of supported types

_constraints.input_condition: action is 'type-registry' AND database includes 'sql' AND query is 'validations'
_constraints.output_rule: Returns JSON array of validation names for the specified type

_constraints.input_condition: action is 'type-registry' AND database does not include 'sql'
_constraints.output_rule: Reports normalized unsupported_profile error

_constraints.input_condition: action is 'type-registry' AND database is 'sql' AND query is 'types' AND type is not recognized
_constraints.output_rule: Returns normalized unsupported_type error

_constraints.input_condition: action is 'detect-editor' AND root includes eAnnotations with source
_constraints.output_rule: Returns JSON object with editor name

_constraints.input_condition: action is 'detect-editor' AND root is null
_constraints.output_rule: Returns JSON object with null_input detail and error

_constraints.feature: check-association valid one-to-one with injected field
_constraints.input_condition: action is 'check-association' AND type is 'one-to-one' AND injectedFieldInFrom is provided
_constraints.output_rule: Returns JSON object with valid set to true

_constraints.input_condition: action is 'check-association' AND association is missing required field
_constraints.output_rule: Returns JSON object with malformed_association error

_constraints.input_condition: action is 'build-command' AND entity provided AND no flags specified
_constraints.output_rule: Returns args array with jhipster entity command and --regenerate flag

_constraints.input_condition: action is 'build-command' AND flags array is provided
_constraints.output_rule: Returns args array with entity command, sorted/littered flags, and --angular-suffix append
Returns merged configuration with cli flags and defaults
Output must contain both 'fluent-methods' and 'fluentMethods' boolean keys with true

_constraints.input_condition: action is 'build-command' AND angular_suffix is provided
_constraints.output_rule: Args array must include standard flags followed by --angular-suffix and the suffix value
Output must preserve 'commentInFrom' and 'commentInTo' fields in associations
Output must include 'injectedFieldInFrom' and 'injectedFieldInTo' fields if applicable

_constraints.feature: entity json generation relationship validate rules
_constraints.output_rule: relationship objects must include 'relationshipValidateRules' field
Output must list entity names in definitional order
Output must use specific relationship type strings
Syntax must use {field} to {field} with braces around field names
Type name in output must be 'Long'
Each entity block must include 'cloudNative' field
Args array must be sorted alphabetically after entity name and regenerate
All flag names in output must match CLI input or known mappings
